info.title: HL Indexer API
info.description:
**API to query Hyperliquid trading data stored**

This API provides access to indexed trading data:
- **Fills**: Executed orders with full details
- **Analytics**: Real-time metrics and statistics

## Features

### Fills
- Advanced filters (user, coin, size, period)
- Time-window summaries
- Top coins by volume
- Large trades
- User-specific fills

### Analytics
- Real-time metrics (lag < 2 seconds)
- Market overview
- Top traders by volume/PnL
- Coin performance

get.description:
Compact fills with filters (user, coin, side, time window).

Note: this endpoint queries the full history and can be slow depending on
the requested period. For faster results (< 24h), prefer `/fills/recent`.

parameters.name: size_usd

schema.description: Minimum notional amount (sz * px) in USD
schema.title: Size Usd

parameters.description: Minimum notional amount (sz * px) in USD

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description:
Max results (cap 1000; None = unlimited)

To request more than 100 results, use an external client (outside Swagger/Redoc).

get.description: Fill statistics for the last `hours` hours window.

Priority gas fee statistics for the last `hours` hours window.
Aggregates total priority gas fees paid across fills (perp + spot).

Daily priority fees chart: fills count vs total gas burned per day.
Uses pre-aggregated AggregatingMergeTree for fast queries.

Leaderboard of gossip priority readers — wallets winning gossip priority auctions.

Hyperliquid runs 5 independent gossip priority slots (Dutch auctions, 180s cycles).
Wallets bid via `gossipPriorityBid` paying HYPE gas. The winner gets network propagation
priority — their messages and orders are gossiped first by validators, giving them a
latency advantage (~10ms per slot). This leaderboard aggregates all wallets that have
won these auctions over time, ranked by total gas spent.
Liquidation statistics for the last `days` days window.

get.description:
Live state of the 5 gossip priority-fee auction slots.
Uses FINAL to get the latest version from ReplacingMergeTree.
`winner` is the wallet address of the previous cycle winner (null if nobody bid).

Historical gossip priority-fee auction winners.
A row is inserted every ~30s for each slot with a non-null winner.

post.description:
Unified POST endpoint. Send a JSON body with a `type` field to select the action.

Example: `{"type": "recentPerpFills", "coin": "BTC", "limit": 100}`

get.summary: Non-funding ledger events for a user (deposits, withdrawals, transfers)
get.description:
Unified non-funding ledger history for a user.

Combines data from:
- **ledger_transfers**: usdSend, spotSend, sendAsset, agentSendAsset,
  withdraw3, usdClassTransfer, subAccountTransfer, vaultTransfer
- **evm_bridge_events**: deposit_vote, withdrawal_finalized

Event types:
- `deposit` — bridge deposit into Hyperliquid
- `withdrawal` — withdraw3 or bridge withdrawal finalized
- `transfer_in` — received via usdSend/spotSend/sendAsset
- `transfer_out` — sent via usdSend/spotSend/sendAsset
- `class_transfer` — perp ↔ spot USDC transfer
- `sub_account` — sub-account transfer
- `vault` — vault deposit/withdrawal
- `agent_send` — agent moving collateral between HIP-3 dexs for the same user
                (`source_dex` / `destination_dex` populated)

get.summary: Aggregated ledger summary per action type for a user
get.description: Count + total amount per action type across all ledger transfers involving this user.

get.summary: Deployer principal deposits/withdrawals on the backstop
get.description:
Raw list of deployer principal transfers (the L1 `hip3LiquidatorTransfer`
action). Each row = a deployer moving principal into or out of a HIP-3
dex's backstop. `ntl` is the raw integer in micro-USDC (1e-6); `ntl_usdc`
is the human-readable amount. `is_deposit=1` for deposits, `0` for
withdrawals.

parameters.name: is_deposit

schema.description: True = deposits only, False = withdrawals only
schema.title: Is Deposit

parameters.description: True = deposits only, False = withdrawals only

get.summary: Per-dex aggregate of backstop principal flows
get.description:
Aggregate by dex over the requested window:

- `total_deposited_usdc` / `total_withdrawn_usdc`: principal flows
- `net_principal_usdc`: deposited − withdrawn (current principal balance,
  since PnL is not withdrawable per protocol)
- `unique_signers`: number of distinct deployer addresses depositing/withdrawing

get.summary: HIP-3 backstop health overview across all dexs
get.description:
One row per dex with a discovered backstop liquidator address. Includes
principal flows (deployer deposits/withdrawals) and on-chain activity
(fills absorbed, fees paid, last fill, coins touched). Sorted by fill
count.

get.summary: HIP-3 backstop health for a single dex
get.description:
Combined backstop snapshot for one dex: principal in/out (deployer
actions) + on-chain fill activity (notional, fees, last fill, coins
active). Returns 404 if no backstop address has been observed for this
dex yet.

get.summary: Fills absorbed by a HIP-3 backstop liquidator
get.description:
Raw fill stream for the backstop address of a given HIP-3 dex. These are
the positions the backstop absorbed from liquidations. Returns an empty
list if the dex has no observed backstop address yet.
